title: *Equality of Permission*
subtitle: The subtitle is The Politics of Feasible Liberalism, and the author is Deirdre Nansen McCloskey. The author wishes to argue for liberalism as opposed to statism, a very good book. And unlike many authors, Deirdre also tells you what she thinks of everyone else’s views. Due out in November. The post *Equality of Permission* appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
The subtitle is The Politics of Feasible Liberalism, and the author is Deirdre Nansen McCloskey.  The author wishes to argue for liberalism as opposed to statism, a very good book.  And unlike many authors, Deirdre also tells you what she thinks of everyone else’s views.  Due out in November.

The post *Equality of Permission* appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
